sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111755" key="fle/i+nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλέϊνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111755.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made from the plant</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φλέως,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">262</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
